message:
fix(vendored): clippy lint remediation, format normalization, and test expansion across WezTerm-derived crates

Comprehensive pass over all vendored frankenterm/ sub-crates to satisfy
pedantic + nursery clippy lints and rustfmt under the workspace's strict
lint configuration. Changes are mechanical/cosmetic except where noted.

Lint suppressions (new #![allow] blocks for vendored code):
- bidi: doc_lazy_continuation, legacy_numeric_constants, match_like_matches_macro,
  needless_range_loop, ptr_arg, upper_case_acronyms
- cell: bind_instead_of_map, collapsible_if, derivable_impls, doc_lazy_continuation,
  from_over_into, len_without_is_empty, needless_option_as_deref, single_match,
  too_many_arguments, unnecessary_cast, vec_box
- color-types: collapsible_if, excessive_precision, needless_return, wrong_self_convention

Redundant lifetime removal (&'static [...] -> &[...]):
- bidi_brackets, bidi_class, char-props/emoji_presentation, char-props/white_space,
  widechar_width (all table constants)

Code quality fixes:
- bidi/lib: replace iter().any(|&i| i == idx) with contains(), remove unreachable
  return statements, collapse nested if into else-if, pass iso_run by reference
- blob-leases/storage: .ok_or_else(|| Error) -> .ok_or(Error) for Copy error
- color-types: rename SrgbaTuple::to_string -> to_color_string to avoid shadowing
  Display trait and update ToDynamic impl to use the new name
- widechar_width: add Default impl for WcLookupTable

Format normalization (rustfmt):
- base91, bintree, blob-leases, cell, config, filedescriptor, input-types,
  mux/tab, procinfo, pty, rangeset, ssh, surface, term/screen, uds, umask:
  line-length wrapping, import reordering, method chain formatting

New test coverage and derive additions:
- blob-leases/lease_id: derive Default via explicit impl (delegates to new())
- config/lib, escape-parser/lib, luahelper/lib, mux/lib, ssh/lib, surface/lib,
  term/lib, termwiz/lib: new test modules expanding coverage
- umask/lib: expanded test suite (continuation of 29->102 expansion)
- procinfo: restructured match arms and expanded platform-specific test coverage
- bidi: derive Default on ParagraphDirectionHint enum variant

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

     ('\u{9}', '\u{9}', BidiClass::SegmentSeparator), // Cc       <control-0009>
     ('\u{a}', '\u{a}', BidiClass::ParagraphSeparator), // Cc       <control-000A>
